asserted.BALANCE_usage_context: Hardcoded as payment_type='BALANCE' for Manual transaction type (y=true branch in bundle code). Expression: x='BALANCE' when manual=true.
asserted.note: BALANCE IS referenced in the frontend JS bundle. It is used as the payment_type value sent to the API when a 'Manual' transaction (credit or debit) is created. This confirms the frontend expects BALANCE to be a valid payment type in the DB. However, no existing SO transaction records were found using BALANCE. Direct DB verification that INV-622 migration added BALANCE is not possible via read-only API.
